.env
*.env

# Python
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/
.eggs/

# Auto-generated PDFs (don't commit these)
pdfs/

# Virtual environments
venv/
env/
.venv/

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/
*.suo
*.ntvs*
*.njsproj
*.sln

.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

*.log
